title: IBA1 Immunochemistry on human paraffin sections
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4m7kc","text":"Iba1-specific Immunochemistry protocol on paraffin-embedded human brain sections ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"ecfd9","text":"Reagents :","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10},{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2lcb9","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"87vva","text":"- TBS 10X : Tris base 121.1g + NaCl 90g in 1L H2O.pH 7.4.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"db5kk","text":"- TBS 1X-Triton 0,5%","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"89tdt","text":"- Xilen","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"38i1e","text":"- Ethanol : 100%, 95%, 70%","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9ena6","text":"- Unmasking buffer epitopes : Citrate solution 10mM pH6.0","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"372lp","text":"- Blocking Buffer : TBS 1X + 5% NGS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3eehl","text":"- 1st Ab : Diluted in1X PBS +2%NGS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c04","text":"- 2nd Ab : Diluted in1X PBS +2%NGS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"60aqi","text":"- Endogenous peroxidase blocking solution : TBS 1x + 3% H2O2(30%) + 10% methanol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Put the slides 30 min in the incubator at 60ºC.
Wash 3x3 min in Xilen.
Wash 1x10 min in ethanol 100%.
Wash 1x10 min in ethanol 95%.
Wash 1x5 min in ethanol 70%.
Wash 2x5 min in TBS 1X.
Put the slides 10 min in endogenous peroxidase blocking solution: TBS 1x + 3% H2O2 + 10% methanol
Wash 3x5 min in buffer TBS 1X.
Put sections in 200 mL of citrate buffer 10mM, pH 6
Put sections in a boiling water bath for 20 min
Let sections cool down for 20 min at RT
Wash 3x5 min in TBS 1X.
Put wet paper in a black box for immunohistochemistry
Gently dry and circle sections with the hydrophobic pen ImmEdge Vector H 4000 without touching the tissue
Blocking in TBS 1X + 5% NGS (200uL/slides) 1h at RT
Gently wipe off the water ofthe slides
Put 200ul/slide of TBS 1X + 2% NGS +anti-IBA1 primary antibody at a concentration of 1:500( Abcam, #ab178846) at 4ºC (cold room)
Wash 3x5min in TBS 1X Buffer.
Gently wipe off the water ofthe slides
Put 200ul/slide TBS 1X + 2% NGS + biotinylated secondary antibody at a concentration of 1:1000 (BA-1000-1.5, Palex) 1h at RT .
At this step it is important to prepare ABC solution and let it, at least, 30 min on the shaker
3x5min in TBS 1X
Incubate 1 hour at RT with ABC solution (4drops A/B in 10 mL of TBS 1x)
3x5min in TBS 1X
In aluminium foil: Vector SG: 3 drops Chromogen + 3 drops Hydrogen Peroxide in 5mL PBS (gives rise to blue staining)
Cover tray plates with aluminium foil
Put 200 uL on each section and put a cardboard box on it to keep darkness for a time ranging from 3-15 minutes depending on the antibody used
Remove with an air-pump equipment and clean the material with bleach
3x5min in TBS 1X
1 min in ethanol 70%
1 min in ethanol 95%
1 min in ethanol 100%.
2x5 min in xylene
Put a line of mounting medium(DPX) byslide.Put the coverslip (washed with ethanol previously) on the slide. Remove bubbles
Let dry the slides on the tray in the hood overnight
creator: Miquel Vila
